about.title: THE SPECIALIST BEHIND PERFECT STRAIGHT HAIR
about.description: With years of experience in the beauty world, Elaine Paiva has become a reference in straightening that combines results and hair health. Leading Dlux Salon, she developed a method focused on...
about.pageIntro: Welcome to the about page! Here you'll learn more about Elaine Paiva's story, experience, and passion for hair care.
about.storyParagraph1: With over a decade of experience in professional hair treatments, Elaine Paiva has dedicated her career to hair transformation and care, using modern techniques and high-quality products.
about.storyParagraph2: Our mission is to provide clients not only with more beautiful hair, but also healthier and more resilient hair.
about.valuesText: We believe every hair type is unique and deserves personalized attention. We are committed to excellence, innovation, and our clients' well-being, always using safe products and approved techniques.
about.ctaText: Want to know more about our services? Contact us and schedule a personalized consultation!
